name: hcportal_getKennel
description: Retrieves comprehensive details for a single kennel by its public ID. Returns kennel profile, location info, website settings, payment configuration (3 slots), default run settings, and related geographic data. Used by both the admin portal and public HashRuns.org sites. Two service account GUIDs bypass the hasher-existence check: 11111111-...=HashRuns.org public access, 22222222-...=admin portal service account. Read-only query.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: the calling user's public hasher ID. Passed to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Two magic service account GUIDs bypass the hasher-existence check: 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 (HashRuns.org) and 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222 (admin portal service account).

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. @publicKennelId is passed as the paramString.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: The public kennel ID to retrieve. Validated IS NULL after auth. Kennel must exist or an error is returned.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

columns.name: Success
columns.description: Always 0 on error

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: Human-readable error message

rowsets.name: KennelDetailResult
rowsets.description: Single row containing comprehensive kennel profile. JOINs HC.City, HC.Region, and HC.Country for geographic data. Only returned when no errors occur.

columns.name: kennelPublicId
columns.description: Kennel.PublicKennelId — the public-facing ID

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never fix the 'canEditRunAttendence' typo without coordinating with all clients
